1	import type { PageLoad } from './$types'
2	import { createClient } from '$lib/gql/client'
3	import { gql } from 'graphql-request'
4	
5	const RUN_DETAIL_QUERY = gql`
6		query RunDetail($id: ID!) {
7			run(id: $id) {
8				id
9				layer
10				status
11				projectID
12				beadId
13				artifactId
14				parentRunId
15				childRunIds
16				startedAt
17				completedAt
18				durationMs
19	
20				queueInputs
21				stopCondition
22				selectedBeadIds
23	
24				baseRevision
25				resultRevision
26				worktreePath
27				mergeOutcome
28				checkResults
29	
30				harness
31				provider
32				model
33				promptSummary
34				powerMin
35				powerMax
36				tokensIn
37				tokensOut
38				costUsd
39				outputExcerpt
40				evidenceLinks
41			}
42		}
43	`
44	
45	export interface RunDetail {
46		id: string
47		layer: string
48		status: string
49		projectID: string | null
50		beadId: string | null
51		artifactId: string | null
52		parentRunId: string | null
53		childRunIds: string[]
54		startedAt: string | null
55		completedAt: string | null
56		durationMs: number | null
57	
58		queueInputs: string | null
59		stopCondition: string | null
60		selectedBeadIds: string[] | null
61	
62		baseRevision: string | null
63		resultRevision: string | null
64		worktreePath: string | null
65		mergeOutcome: string | null
66		checkResults: string | null
67	
68		harness: string | null
69		provider: string | null
70		model: string | null
71		promptSummary: string | null
72		powerMin: number | null
73		powerMax: number | null
74		tokensIn: number | null
75		tokensOut: number | null
76		costUsd: number | null
77		outputExcerpt: string | null
78		evidenceLinks: string[] | null
79	}
80	
81	const PARENT_RUN_QUERY = gql`
82		query ParentRunParent($id: ID!) {
83			run(id: $id) {
84				parentRunId
85			}
86		}
87	`
88	
89	const PRODUCED_ARTIFACT_QUERY = gql`
90		query ProducedArtifact($projectID: ID!, $id: ID!) {
91			artifact(projectID: $projectID, id: $id) {
92				id
93				title
94			}
95		}
96	`
97	
98	export interface ProducedArtifact {
99		id: string
100		title: string
101	}
102	
103	export const load: PageLoad = async ({ params, fetch }) => {
104		const client = createClient(fetch as unknown as typeof globalThis.fetch)
105		const data = await client.request<{ run: RunDetail | null }>(RUN_DETAIL_QUERY, {
106			id: params.runId
107		})
108	
109		let grandparentRunId: string | null = null
110		if (data.run?.layer === 'run' && data.run.parentRunId) {
111			const parentData = await client.request<{ run: { parentRunId: string | null } | null }>(
112				PARENT_RUN_QUERY,
113				{ id: data.run.parentRunId }
114			)
115			grandparentRunId = parentData.run?.parentRunId ?? null
116		}
117	
118		let producedArtifact: ProducedArtifact | null = null
119		if (data.run?.artifactId) {
120			try {
121				const artData = await client.request<{ artifact: ProducedArtifact | null }>(
122					PRODUCED_ARTIFACT_QUERY,
123					{ projectID: params.projectId, id: data.run.artifactId }
124				)
125				producedArtifact = artData.artifact
126			} catch {
127				producedArtifact = null
128			}
129		}
130	
131		return {
132			nodeId: params.nodeId,
133			projectId: params.projectId,
134			runId: params.runId,
135			run: data.run,
136			grandparentRunId,
137			producedArtifact
138		}
139	}
140

input.content:
No code changes are required: all 6 acceptance criteria for ddx-669e1c2f
are already satisfied by commit 44c5014a ("feat(ui): bead↔run cross-links
and runs.spec.ts e2e [ddx-669e1c2f]"), which is an ancestor of the current
base revision (c529d15307bb7985176b936566a5a7e8f7d27c9f).

The prior REVIEW:BLOCK note on this bead said "Diff only contains execution
evidence files... no actual implementation changes... are visible in the
provided diff." That was a misread of the prior attempt's evidence-only
worktree commits — the substantive implementation had already been merged
in 44c5014a and is present on main.

Evidence for each AC item, against the current tree:

1. Bead detail shows linked run records; clicking navigates to run detail.
   - cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/beads/[beadId]/+page.ts
     loads beadRuns via the Bead query (lines 51-63).
   - cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/BeadDetail.svelte
     renders a `data-testid="bead-linked-runs"` section with anchor rows
     pointing at /nodes/:nodeId/projects/:projectId/runs/:runId (lines 464-495).

2. Run try/work detail beadId links navigate to bead detail.
   - cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/runs/[runId]/+page.svelte
     `beadHref` (line 21-23) is rendered in the common header (line 138)
     and again for selectedBeadIds in the work-layer section (line 171).

3. Run-layer detail: artifact link present when artifactId set; link is live.
   - +page.ts loads `producedArtifact` via PRODUCED_ARTIFACT_QUERY when
     `run.artifactId` is set (lines 89-128).
   - +page.svelte renders the `data-testid="produced-artifact"` block with
     a live `<a href={artifactHref(...)}>` (lines 143-153).

4. Artifact detail: 'Producing run' link is live and navigates to run detail.
   - cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/[artifactId]/+page.svelte
     renders `<a data-testid="run-link" href={runHref}>` when `data.runExists`
     is true, gated by a probe in +page.ts (lines 470-491 / +page.ts:73).

5. Combined runs list row click carries correct projectId in URL.
   - cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/runs/+page.svelte
     `runDetailHref` builds `/nodes/${nodeId}/projects/${run.projectID}/runs/${run.id}`
     from the row's own `projectID` field (lines 68-71), and the row
     `onclick={() => goto(runDetailHref(edge.node))}` uses it (line 192).

6. runs.spec.ts passes: complete work→try→run drill-down, breadcrumb
   back-navigation, artifact link.
   - cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs.spec.ts contains both tests:
     "runs work→try→run drill-down with breadcrumb back-navigation and
     artifact link" (line 161) and "bead detail shows linked runs and
     click navigates to run detail" (line 319). The spec covers all
     8 workflow steps from the bead description.

Because nothing further is required to satisfy the contract, no commit
is produced for this attempt.

data.text:
All 6 acceptance criteria for ddx-669e1c2f are already satisfied by commit `44c5014a` (an ancestor of the current base `c529d153`). The prior REVIEW:BLOCK was a misread of an evidence-only diff — the actual implementation (BeadDetail linked-runs section, run-detail bead/artifact links, artifact-detail producing-run link, combined `/nodes/:nodeId/runs` projectId-aware row navigation, and `runs.spec.ts`) is present on main.

Wrote `.ddx/executions/20260501T072937-a96ae1b7/no_changes_rationale.txt` mapping each AC item to the file/line that satisfies it. No commit produced.
